name: numpad-shortcuts
description: Numpad keys with built-in file operations and custom commands

numpad-shortcuts.num1.description: Command for Numpad 1. Use 'builtin:run-file' for built-in run file feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num2.description: Command for Numpad 2. Use 'builtin:delete-file' for built-in delete file feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num3.description: Command for Numpad 3. Use 'builtin:rename-file' for built-in rename file feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num4.description: Command for Numpad 4. Use 'builtin:copy-path' for built-in copy path feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num5.description: Command for Numpad 5. Use 'builtin:open-folder' for built-in open folder feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num6.description: Command for Numpad 6. Use 'builtin:format-file' for built-in format file feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num7.description: Command for Numpad 7. Use 'builtin:git-commit' for built-in git commit feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num8.description: Command for Numpad 8. Use 'builtin:copy-file' for built-in copy file feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num9.description: Command for Numpad 9. Use 'builtin:search-file' for built-in search file feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}

numpad-shortcuts.num0.description: Command for Numpad 0. Use 'builtin:show-functions' for built-in show functions feature, or specify a custom command. Available variables: ${file}, ${fileName}, ${fileDir}, ${workspace}
